stemHtml: The coriolis force is proportional to (1) _____ and it acts at a 90º to (2) _____.

options.a: (1) the pressure gradient force, (2) the isobar.
options.b: (1) wind speed; (2) the pressure gradient force.
options.c: (1) the pressure gradient force; (2) the thermal wind.
options.d: (1) wind speed; (2) the actual wind direction.
